notes: Thin specialisation layer (113 lines, 2 theorems) pinning the generic witness-parametric separability and sepDegree=pointCount results from Separability.lean and PointFix.lean to the concrete isogOneSub_negFrobenius isogeny. Both theorems are called exclusively from other files (AdditionPullback/Differential.lean and Hasse/HoleE.lean), so both appear as dead code within this file. No sorries, no maxHeartbeats overrides, no long proofs.
